about.title: About Krish
about.bio:
I'm Krish Chhatrala, an AI creator and automation expert passionate about democratizing artificial intelligence. With over 150,000 followers across social platforms, I've built a community of creators and founders who believe in working smarter, not harder.

My mission is simple: take complex AI concepts and turn them into actionable workflows that anyone can implement. From custom ChatGPT prompts to full-scale automation systems, I create resources that deliver immediate, tangible value.

Every workflow, prompt, and tool I share is battle-tested in real-world scenarios. I don't believe in theory—I believe in execution. That's why my content focuses on practical implementation that you can plug directly into your business or creative process.

When I'm not building AI workflows, you'll find me experimenting with the latest tools, recreating successful creator videos, or designing automation systems that push the boundaries of what's possible with current technology.
about.mission: To democratize AI knowledge and empower creators with practical, executable automation workflows.
